word: G369 - ἀναντιῤῥήτως - anantirrhḗtōs - an-an-tir-hray'-toce - Without gainsaying

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναντιῤῥήτως

- Transliteration: Anantirrhetos

- Phonetic: an-an-tir-hray'-toce

- Definition:

1. without contradiction

- Origin: from G368

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G368; promptly: - without gainsaying.
